page_metadata.bioconda__summary: CrossMap is a program for convenient conversion of genome coordinates and genomeannotation files between assemblies.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Crossmap is a program for convenient conversion of genome coordinates and genomeannotation files between assemblies.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: An efficient tool for converting genome coordinates between assemblies. CrossMap supports most of the commonly used file formats, including BAM, sequence alignment map, Wiggle, BigWig, browser extensible data, general feature format, gene transfer format and variant call format.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An efficient tool for converting genome coordinates between assemblies. CrossMap supports most of the commonly used file formats, including BAM, sequence alignment map, Wiggle, BigWig, browser extensible data, general feature format, gene transfer format and variant call format.
